name: Georgia Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Georgia - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description: Georgia Nurse Aide Registry, P.O. Box 105448, Atlanta, GA 30348-5448

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: Who administers the Georgia CNA exam?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Georgia nurse aide exam is administered by Credentia. Register at credentia.com/test-takers/ga.

mainEntity.name: How do I verify a Georgia CNA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the Georgia CareConnect portal (Alliant Health Solutions) at mmis.georgia.gov/portal_nar/ or search on georgia.gov.
